TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Qoyaw == i Taoyuen a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Qoyaw. u kasalumaluma' nu Qoyaw sa, 25 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 115 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 109 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u zuma sa, cay ku yingcumin, 6 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 90%, zumazuma 5%. Qoyaw i Taoyuen a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Qoyaw. u kasalumaluma' nu Qoyaw sa, 23 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 43 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 36 ku tademaw, pakalatu 84%. u zuma sa, cay ku yingcumin, 7 ku tademaw, pakalatu 16%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 84%. Qoyaw i Taoyuen a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Qoyaw. u kasalumaluma' nu Qoyaw sa, 53 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 175 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 164 ku tademaw, pakalatu 94%. u zuma sa, cay ku yingcumin, 11 ku tademaw, pakalatu 6%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 89%, Amis 2%, Paiwan 1%, zumazuma 3%.
S.PHON: == *ojaw == i taoju…ôn a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu *ojaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu *ojaw sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jiŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajar~…ĺ **%, zumazuma *%. *ojaw i taoju…ôn a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu *ojaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu *ojaw sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, ** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jiŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajar~…ĺ **%. *ojaw i taoju…ôn a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu *ojaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu *ojaw sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jiŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajar~…ĺ **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: == Qoyaw == i Taoyuen a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Qoyaw. u kasalumaluma' nu Qoyaw sa, 25 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 115 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 109 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u zuma sa, cay ku yingcumin, 6 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 90%, zumazuma 5%. Qoyaw i Taoyuen a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Qoyaw. u kasalumaluma' nu Qoyaw sa, 23 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 43 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 36 ku tademaw, pakalatu 84%. u zuma sa, cay ku yingcumin, 7 ku tademaw, pakalatu 16%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 84%. Qoyaw i Taoyuen a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Qoyaw. u kasalumaluma' nu Qoyaw sa, 53 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 175 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 164 ku tademaw, pakalatu 94%. u zuma sa, cay ku yingcumin, 11 ku tademaw, pakalatu 6%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 89%, Amis 2%, Paiwan 1%, zumazuma 3%.
